title: Indigenous Music – 3/29/21
summary: March 29, 2021 This week, we explore an eclectic mix of Indigenous music from some of our favorite artists and some exciting new voices. Spanning genres from blues to hip-hop, these tracks dig deep, buzz with life, and celebrate culture. Tune in for a mix of artists representing tribes from all over...

title: PPP Extended to May 31, 2021
summary: On Thursday, March 25, 2021, Congress passed a bill to extend the loan application deadline for the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) to May 31, 2021. This extension also gives the SBA through June 30, 2021, to process lender applications. The PPP Extension Act of 2021 is expected to be signed into...
